package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for upstream_json_decode_same_response_multiple_times: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: One upstream HTTP response body decoded into multiple targets in the same handler.
type CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesModel
}

type CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesService struct {
    repo *CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimesDTO) error {
    focus := "upstream_json_decode_same_response"
    _ = focus
    upstream := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = upstream
    c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": input, "items": items})
    writer := bufio.NewWriter(c.Writer)
    defer writer.Flush()
    upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative := map[string]int{"upstream": 1, "json": 2, "decode": 3, "response": 4, "multiple": 5, "times": 6}
    upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    upstream_negative_0 := upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative["upstream"] + len(input)
    _ = upstream_negative_0
    json_negative_1 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_negative_1
    decode_negative_2 := fmt.Sprintf("decode:%s", input)
    _ = decode_negative_2
    response_negative_3 := upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative["response"] + len(input)
    _ = response_negative_3
    multiple_negative_4 := upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_negative_4
    times_negative_5 := upstream_json_decode_response_multiple_negative["times"] + len(input)
    _ = times_negative_5
    return nil
}
